slides.title: INSERT with PDO
INSERT Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$name = 'Jane';
$email = 'jane@example.com';
$age = 25;
$sql = "INSERT INTO users (name, email, age) VALUES (:name, :email, :age)";
$stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
if ($stmt->execute(['name' => $name, 'email' => $email, 'age' => $age])) {
    echo "User added with ID: " . $pdo->lastInsertId();
} else {
    echo "Insert failed.";
}
?>

slides.title: UPDATE and DELETE
UPDATE and rowCount
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$id = 10;
$newAge = 32;
$stmt = $pdo->prepare("UPDATE users SET age = :age WHERE id = :id");
$stmt->execute(['age' => $newAge, 'id' => $id]);
$count = $stmt->rowCount();
echo "Updated $count rows.";
?>

quizData.question: Which method returns the number of rows affected by an INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE?
quizData.explanation: rowCount() returns the number of rows affected by the last SQL statement.
